name: souroldgeezer-architecture
description: Reference-driven ArchiMate® architecture modeling for enterprise, solution, and application architectures. Covers dediren package source, SVG render evidence, optional OEF export, build/extract/review/render/validate/lookup, drift detection, .NET™ / Bicep™ / workflow lifting, per-view readiness, matching Claude Code subagent, and Codex skill metadata.

interface.longDescription: Build, extract, review, render, validate, and look up ArchiMate® models as dediren packages with bundled references, package fixtures, SVG render evidence, optional OEF export, and drift procedures.
defaultPrompt: Review this dediren architecture package for professional readiness.
Render this dediren package to SVG and validate the views.
Extract an ArchiMate® model package from this codebase.
